description: Transfer ownership of an OAuth2 client to another user

parameters.name: new-owner
parameters.notes: This is a user ID, not a Xion address

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Required flag to confirm the ownership transfer

validation_rules: Only the current owner can transfer ownership
The new owner must be a valid user ID
--force flag is required to confirm the transfer

errors.remediation: Only the current owner can transfer ownership
Check the client ID and try again
Provide --new-owner with a valid user ID
Re-run the command with --force to confirm
